query_normalized: visual generation in the new era: an evolution from atomic mapping to agentic world modeling other
rationale: The paper directly examines the evolution of visual generation models, proposing a taxonomy (Atomic to Agentic to World‑Modeling) that matches the user's focus on “visual generation… from atomic mapping to agentic world modeling,” satisfying same‑mechanism evidence (a) and serving as a canonical reference for this research area.
